reason: Bitcoin is experiencing a significant and prolonged markdown phase, marked by a five-month slide and its worst losing streak since 2018. Altcoins, exemplified by XRP's 9% tumble, are also under considerable pressure. While some geopolitical fears are being mitigated and a destabilizing code change proposal was quickly rejected, the overall market sentiment remains negative due to persistent price weakness and underlying speculative activity around high-impact geopolitical events. Further downside risk remains significant.
headlines: Crypto community fear of Iran choking oil supply and crashing markets may be overblown
Former Mt. Gox CEO proposed a rewrite of bitcoin's code to recover $5 billion in stolen funds. Gets quickly shutdown
Suspected insiders make over $1.2 million on Polymarket by betting on U.S.'s Iran strike
XRP tumbles 9% as break below $1.36 wipes out relief rally
Bitcoin's five-month slide: why BTC is set for worst losing streak since 2018
